title: UK-Kyrgyzstan Inaugural Strategic Dialogue
body: "The Deputy Foreign Minister of the Kyrgyz Republic and The Minister of State for Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Affairs of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland held the inaugural Strategic Dialogue between the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Kyrgyz Republic and the Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland on 13 February 2024.  The dialogue was an opportunity to mark the achievements of Kyrgyz-UK diplomatic relations over the past 33 years. The Parties discussed a range of global and regional issues and identified promising areas for future cooperation to deepen our growing partnership.   Deputy Foreign Minister of the Kyrgyz Republic, Meder Abakirov and the Minister of State of the United Kingdom, Stephen Doughty MP "
